arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer latest: January window update as Arne Slot, Richard Hughes eye targets to boost Premier League title charge
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly actively looking at targets they can bring to the club in the upcoming transfer windows as they seek to strengthen key areas of their squad.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah pokes fun at Jamie Carragher contract claim with rare social media post
arts.sum: Liverpool forward Mohamed Salah was quick to hit back at Jamie Carragher's assessment on social media

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher points finger at Arne Slot over huge Trent Alexander-Arnold mistake
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold had a difficult day in defence for Liverpool against Manchester United and was at fault for their first goal at Anfield after being left exposed against Diogo Dalot and Bruno Fernandes

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest move within six points of leaders Liverpool with win at Wolves
arts.sum: A brilliant season under Nuno Espirito Santo continued at Molineux thanks to goals from Morgan Gibbs-White, Chris Wood and Taiwo Awoniyi.

arts.ttl: Forest wins at Wolves and closes gap on Premier League leader Liverpool
arts.sum: First-half goals from Morgan Gibbs-White and Chris Wood and an injury-time third from Taiwo Awoniyi took Nuno Espírito Santo’s men to 40 points, equal with Arsenal, which is above them on goal difference. Nottingham Forest beat Wolverhampton Wanderers 3-0 away from home on Monday and moved within six points of Premier League leader Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool table €50m offer for Real Madrid star; coming weeks could be decisive
arts.sum: Liverpool have an offer on the table worth €50m for Real Madrid star Aurelien Tchouameni, according to Spanish outlet Fichajes. The offer consists of an initial payment of €35 million, with the remaining €15 million to be paid next season. arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah fires 'obsessed' dig at Jamie Carragher as Liverpool saga continues
arts.sum: Carragher had urged Egyptian to “take a leaf out of” Virgil van Dijk’s book

arts.ttl: Mo Salah sends eight-word message to Jamie Carragher after the Liverpool legend aimed a dig at the Egyptian and Trent Alexander-Arnold by heaping praise on Virgil van Dijk amid their contract sagas
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has hit out at Jamie Carragher, amid the ongoing uncertainty over his future at Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Jamie Carragher responds to cryptic Mohamed Salah social media post with Virgil van Dijk claim
arts.sum: Three Liverpool stars will be out of contract in the summer as it stands

arts.ttl: David Ornstein Shares Exciting Tottenham Transfer Update After Kinsky
arts.sum: Antonin Kinsky might be the first of several Tottenham signings this month.
